name: caboose-cursor-plugins
description: 7-in-1 plugin bundle: session analysis, auto-linting, CI monitoring, Copilot reviews, git workflows, Slack, and gists. Go port of claude-plugins for Cursor IDE.
longDescription: Complete workflow automation suite ported from Eric Boehs' claude-plugins. Includes: 🔍 session-improver (analyze token waste), 🔧 code-lint (auto-linting hooks), ⏱️ watch-ci (live GitHub Actions), 🤖 gh-copilot-review (automated PR feedback), 🔀 git-utils (semantic commits), 💬 slack (team communication), and 📝 gist (AI-documented code sharing). Originally Ruby/Bash for Claude Code CLI, reimplemented as Go binaries for Cursor IDE.

credits.note: These plugins are direct ports of ericboehs/claude-plugins adapted for Cursor IDE
